scripts.build: npm run build -w @pwd-meter/core && npm run build -w @pwd-meter/react && npm run build -w @pwd-meter/vue && npm run build -w @pwd-meter/angular
scripts.dev:react: npm run build -w @pwd-meter/core && npm run build -w @pwd-meter/react && npm run dev -w react-demo
scripts.build:demo:pages: npm run build -w @pwd-meter/core && npm run build -w @pwd-meter/react && npm run build:pages -w react-demo
